overview: A high-impact influencer and giveaway-driven launch campaign that transformed a new African-inspired restaurant into a highly anticipated, packed destination in Birmingham's bustling Star City.
fullDescription: Afrikana is a fast-growing restaurant brand celebrated for its community-driven approach and modern twist on African-inspired cuisine. To guarantee their new location at the bustling Star City entertainment complex did not just blend in with established competitors, Centauri orchestrated a grand opening event fueled by major community giveaways and strategic influencer partnerships. By leveraging high-profile creator attendance and offering high-value rewards like a paid holiday, cash prizes, and free food, the campaign amplified digital buzz across platforms and drove huge, block-spanning crowds to the venue on day one.
challenge: Located within one of Birmingham’s busiest entertainment hotspots, Afrikana needed to break through the noise of numerous established restaurants, cinemas, and attractions. The primary goal was to generate immense pre-launch anticipation, drive significant physical footfall on opening day, and immediately position the new location as a premier, standout dining destination.
solution: Centauri delivered a high-impact launch event that seamlessly blended influencer marketing with massive community giveaways. By partnering with a major TikTok creator to reach a younger demographic and offering high-value incentives, the team captured and amplified every moment across social platforms, successfully turning digital excitement into real-world queues.

overview: Centauri partnered with Al Murad Tiles to elevate their digital presence through high-quality visual content, increasing engagement, brand perception, and customer interest across a competitive retail market.
fullDescription: Al Murad Tiles is a well-established name in the UK tiling industry, offering a wide range of premium tiles and design solutions for both residential and commercial spaces. Partnering with the brand, Centauri implemented a content-led strategy designed to modernise their digital presence and showcase the quality, variety, and application of their products. Through clean, high-definition visuals and structured storytelling, we highlighted tile textures, finishes, and real-world installations, transforming static products into visually engaging content. This approach allowed Al Murad to better communicate design inspiration and position itself as both a practical supplier and a style-led destination within the tiling market.
challenge: Despite having a strong product range and established reputation, Al Murad Tiles faced the challenge of translating their in-store experience and product quality into an engaging digital presence. Existing content lacked consistency and did not fully showcase the visual impact of their tiles in real-life settings, limiting engagement and customer inspiration. The key challenge was to elevate visual storytelling, improve content quality, and make their digital platforms a stronger driver of customer interest and store visits.
solution: Centauri deployed a refined content strategy focused on clean, high-quality visuals and application-led storytelling to showcase tiles within real environments. By introducing a more consistent visual direction and highlighting key design features such as texture, finish, and space transformation, we created content that was both inspirational and commercially effective. Supported by a structured, data-informed posting approach, this increased visibility, strengthened brand perception, and drove greater engagement across digital platforms.

overview: Centauri partnered with Boo Burger’s new Star City franchise to drive rapid local awareness and demand through high-impact food content and a structured growth strategy. By combining cinematic visuals with consistent, engagement-led distribution, we transformed a new launch into a recognised and in-demand destination within Birmingham’s competitive burger scene.
fullDescription: Boo Burger is a modern smashburger concept built around bold flavour, clean execution, and a strong urban identity, delivering high-quality burgers designed to stand out in a saturated fast-food market. Partnering with their newly launched Star City franchise, Centauri implemented a targeted market-entry strategy focused on building immediate awareness and sustained demand within a competitive local landscape. Through elevated visual direction and high-fidelity food cinematography, we transformed core menu items into crave-driven, scroll-stopping content that emphasised texture, heat, and indulgence. This was paired with a structured content system and engagement-led distribution approach, allowing us to convert early attention into consistent footfall. The result was a rapid transition from a new, unknown location into a recognised and in-demand destination, positioning Boo Burger Star City as a serious player within Birmingham’s burger scene.
challenge: Despite launching with a strong brand concept and quality product offering, Boo Burger’s Star City franchise faced the challenge of entering an already saturated Birmingham food market with little to no initial awareness at a local level. As a new location, there was limited digital traction, low audience familiarity, and no established content ecosystem to consistently drive engagement or footfall. The key challenge was to rapidly build visibility, create a compelling first impression, and convert early attention into sustained demand, while differentiating the brand from well-established competitors in a highly crowded burger scene.
solution: Centauri executed a high-impact market-entry strategy by refining Boo Burger’s visual identity into a cleaner, more distinctive aesthetic tailored for digital performance, while deploying a sensory-led content approach focused on texture, motion, and indulgence to immediately capture attention. This premium content was supported by a structured, data-driven posting cadence and proactive community engagement, designed to maximise reach, build familiarity, and convert early viewers into consistent, returning customers.

overview: A high-impact 10-day social media launch campaign that introduced Birmingham's first combined smash burger and wok noodle concept, generating viral hype and block-spanning queues on opening day.
fullDescription: Burger & Wok is a fresh takeaway concept located near Star City in Birmingham that uniquely combines customizable smash burgers, wok-tossed Asian dishes, boba tea, and matcha all under one roof. With only ten days until their grand opening, Centauri developed a highly targeted pre-launch content strategy to generate immediate local excitement and instant brand recognition for this unprecedented menu mix. By leveraging scroll-stopping food videography and precise local targeting, we successfully transformed rapid online visibility into massive real-world demand, launching the brand with a queue of over one hundred and fifty customers before the doors even opened.
challenge: Launching a completely new food concept with only a 10-day lead time before the grand opening left zero room for error. Burger & Wok needed to rapidly build awareness in a competitive area, generate immediate excitement, and drive significant physical foot traffic from the very first moment they opened their doors.
solution: Centauri executed a fast, high-impact pre-launch strategy across TikTok and Instagram that showcased the highly unique menu combination to spark immediate curiosity. The campaign utilized scroll-stopping food close-ups, chef action shots, and precise local targeting around Star City to maximize visibility and turn digital engagement into real-world anticipation.

overview: Centauri partnered with Cake Inn to drive growth through high-impact content and targeted ad campaigns, increasing visibility, engagement, and measurable customer demand.
fullDescription: Cake Inn is a dessert-focused brand known for its indulgent cakes, milk-based desserts, and visually rich menu designed to appeal to a wide, social-first audience. Partnering with the brand, Centauri implemented a performance-driven strategy combining high-impact content with paid advertising to accelerate growth and maximise reach. Through high-fidelity, sensory-led food cinematography, we transformed core products into scroll-stopping visuals that highlighted texture, richness, and portion appeal. This was paired with targeted ad campaigns designed to amplify top-performing content, allowing us to reach new audiences while reinforcing brand visibility among existing customers. This integrated approach positioned Cake Inn as a highly visible and demand-driven player within a competitive dessert market.
challenge: Operating in a saturated dessert market, Cake Inn faced the challenge of standing out and achieving consistent visibility across digital platforms. While the product offering was strong, organic content alone was not generating the level of reach required to scale growth. The key challenge was to increase exposure, improve content performance, and convert digital attention into measurable sales through a more structured and performance-led approach.
solution: Centauri deployed a combined organic and paid strategy, producing high-quality, sensory-driven content optimised for engagement and then scaling its impact through targeted advertising campaigns. By identifying high-performing creatives and amplifying them to the right audiences, we maximised reach while maintaining strong content quality. Supported by ongoing optimisation and engagement-led distribution, this approach increased visibility, improved conversion, and drove sustained customer demand.

overview: A community-driven social media launch campaign that built massive pre-opening anticipation, turning a London cult favorite into a viral sensation with block-spanning queues in Birmingham.
fullDescription: D’s Kitchen is a highly popular restaurant brand that began as a humble delivery service in London and is now renowned for serving soulful meals that fuse traditional Somali cuisine with modern fast food concepts. To ensure a massive turnout for their new Ladypool Road location in Birmingham, Centauri crafted a community-driven marketing campaign that utilized behind-the-scenes storytelling and highly targeted local social media teasers to build intense anticipation before the doors even opened. This strategic approach cut through the competitive local food scene, transforming online hype into a block-spanning queue on opening day and establishing the brand as an immediate staple in the city.
challenge: When expanding to Birmingham's famous Ladypool Road, D’s Kitchen needed to cut through the noise of a highly competitive food culture and achieve more than just a standard opening day. The primary challenge was to build intense pre-launch anticipation, clearly communicate their authentic brand story, and cultivate a loyal new community rather than just attracting one-off customers.
solution: Centauri developed a community-driven social media strategy that built massive anticipation through targeted local teasers on TikTok and Instagram. By sharing behind-the-scenes footage, highlighting the founder's journey, and utilizing interactive content to spark conversations and a fear of missing out, the campaign successfully translated digital storytelling into massive real-world foot traffic on opening day.

overview: A high-fidelity visual transformation and trend-driven social media strategy that successfully elevated a neighborhood dessert shop into Birmingham's premier destination for viral chicken tenders.
fullDescription: Dairy King is a Green Lane, Birmingham food destination that successfully pivoted from a local dessert shop to a viral hotspot renowned for its fresh, made-to-order chicken tenders, crinkle-cut fries, and signature homemade sauce. To transition them into a top-tier dining spot, Centauri executed a comprehensive branding and market intelligence approach, overhauling their digital aesthetic with high-fidelity cinematic video content to showcase the freshness and texture of their menu. By combining deep market integration with trend-driven social media distribution, this visual transformation aggressively increased their reach, kept them at the forefront of local digital conversations, and drove a measurable surge in physical sales.
challenge: The objective was to transition Dairy King from a neighborhood dessert shop into a top-tier food destination following a major menu pivot. They needed to establish a consistent brand voice and professional identity that would maintain their existing momentum while aggressively increasing reach, sparking widespread online conversation, and driving higher real-world sales volumes.
solution: Centauri implemented a branding and market intelligence strategy anchored by a high-fidelity visual transformation that significantly increased video quality. By deeply integrating product details with the exact preferences of Birmingham food enthusiasts and leveraging current social media trends, the team amplified digital reach and consistently kept the brand at the center of the local food conversation.

overview: A culturally immersive content strategy that successfully bridged the gap between authentic Saudi hospitality and the UK market, turning a London restaurant into a viral dining destination.
fullDescription: Diwan Kitchen is a premium culinary destination in London inspired by traditional Saudi gathering spaces, serving authentic dishes like slow-cooked kabsa and tender lamb mandi in a highly comfortable, family-friendly atmosphere. To help them introduce authentic Saudi cuisine to a diverse UK audience, Centauri executed a cultural bridge and immersive experience strategy that utilized high-impact storytelling, Arabic language cues, and experiential marketing. This approach successfully communicated the warmth of their hospitality, educated the local demographic on unique flavor profiles, and established the restaurant as a premier culinary hub that attracts traveling customers from across the region.
challenge: The primary objective was to successfully introduce authentic Saudi cuisine to the UK audience while moving beyond generic food photography. Diwan Kitchen needed a specialized approach to effectively communicate the warmth of their hospitality and educate a diverse London demographic on the unique flavor profiles of the Kingdom, all while connecting deeply with their niche target market.
solution: Centauri implemented a community-driven storytelling approach using Arabic cultural cues and language to establish immediate authenticity. By combining high-fidelity videos of the experiential dining journey—focusing on the textures of the food and the ritual of freshly brewed tea—with a strong emphasis on their welcoming, family-friendly environment, we successfully lowered the barrier to entry for new customers and positioned the restaurant as a true gathering space.

overview: A sensory-driven social media blitz that transformed a new halal German Doner shop into a viral destination near Birmingham's Grand Central Station.
fullDescription: Dresden Doner is an authentic halal German Doner restaurant located near Birmingham Grand Central Station that offers a modern diner experience with premium cuts of chicken and lamb. To help them stand out in a saturated market, Centauri executed a targeted discovery blitz utilizing hyper-local video content, location mapping, and strategic community engagement to rapidly scale their digital reach and drive immediate physical foot traffic.
challenge: Dresden Doner faced a highly saturated quick-service restaurant market in Birmingham and needed to drive both brand discovery and rapid customer conversion. The goal was to ensure the local community knew about the restaurant, its prime location, and premium menu offerings while completely removing any friction for potential customers trying to navigate there.
solution: Centauri implemented a sensory-driven content strategy featuring trend-focused videography with macro food shots and intuitive location-mapping videos that showed commuters exactly how to walk from Grand Central to the shop. Additionally, a deal-centric narrative was used to appeal to budget-conscious locals, paired with real-time direct-response engagement to turn online interest and comments into immediate store visits.

overview: Centauri partnered with Heavenly Beds to elevate its digital presence through high-quality visual content, increasing brand credibility, customer trust, and enquiry volume within a competitive retail market.
fullDescription: Heavenly Beds is a retail brand specialising in high-quality beds, mattresses, and bedroom furniture, focused on comfort, durability, and value. Partnering with the brand, Centauri implemented a content-led strategy designed to modernise its digital presence and better showcase product quality and range. Through clean, high-definition visuals and structured product storytelling, we highlighted design, materials, and in-store experience, transforming static products into engaging content. This approach positioned Heavenly Beds as a credible and accessible choice within the home retail space, strengthening both perception and customer interest.
challenge: Operating in a competitive furniture market, Heavenly Beds faced the challenge of standing out in a space where many competitors rely on generic product imagery and price-led messaging. Existing digital content lacked consistency and did not fully communicate the quality or value of the offering, limiting engagement and enquiries. The key challenge was to elevate presentation, build trust, and differentiate the brand through stronger visual communication.
solution: Centauri deployed a refined content strategy focused on clean, professional visuals and structured storytelling to highlight product features, comfort, and design. By introducing a consistent visual direction and improving overall content quality, we ensured the brand presented itself in a more premium and trustworthy way across all platforms. Supported by a structured posting cadence and engagement-led distribution, this increased visibility, strengthened brand perception, and drove higher-quality customer enquiries.

overview: A premium content and ambiance-driven strategy that differentiated a new aesthetic health brand, establishing it as a daily wellness destination in a highly saturated market.
fullDescription: JÜCI is a vibrant, health-driven brand located in Hall Green, specializing in cold-pressed juices, superfood smoothies, and premium matcha. Standing out as a pioneer in Birmingham's wellness scene, they are the first to offer inclusive, high-performance ingredients like halal collagen and spirulina blends. To help them break through the generic aesthetic health industry shortly after their launch, Centauri took full ownership of their content production to maintain consistent narrative momentum. By highlighting their unique inclusive niche and utilizing ambiance-driven visuals that showcased both their premium ingredients and gorgeous physical interior, we successfully cut through the digital noise and transformed the brand into a daily habit for local wellness enthusiasts.
challenge: In a saturated and highly generic aesthetic health industry, JÜCI faced the challenge of differentiating itself from standard premium competitors just months after launching. The brand needed to avoid post-launch fatigue and move beyond basic, visually pleasing content to establish a unique, authoritative voice that could outperform established competitors during the rapid rise of modern fitness trends.
solution: Centauri implemented a premium wellness and ambiance approach, taking full ownership of content production to ensure a steady stream of high-quality assets. Instead of following generic industry tropes, the strategy highlighted JÜCI's unique inclusive market positioning and utilized ambiance-driven visuals to showcase the premium ingredients, the relaxed atmosphere, and the aesthetic care put into the physical customer experience.

overview: Centauri partnered with LYS Café to elevate its digital presence through high-impact café and brunch content, increasing brand appeal, engagement, and consistent customer footfall.
fullDescription: LYS Café is a modern café concept built around aesthetically presented drinks, brunch-style dishes, and a relaxed, social-first dining experience. Partnering with the brand, Centauri implemented a content-led growth strategy designed to amplify its visual identity and attract a trend-conscious audience. Through high-fidelity, sensory-driven cinematography, we captured coffee pours, plated dishes, and table setups, transforming everyday café moments into scroll-stopping content. This approach positioned LYS Café as a visually engaging and desirable destination, aligned with the expectations of a digitally driven brunch and café culture.
challenge: Operating in a highly competitive café and brunch market, LYS Café faced the challenge of standing out in a space driven heavily by aesthetics and online discovery. While the offering was strong, existing content lacked the consistency and visual impact needed to fully capture attention and drive engagement. The key challenge was to elevate presentation, increase visibility, and position the café as a must-visit destination.
solution: Centauri deployed a refined content strategy centred around high-quality, sensory-led visuals designed to maximise aesthetic appeal and shareability. By focusing on key café moments — from coffee pours to plated brunch dishes — we created engaging, performance-driven content tailored for social platforms. Supported by a structured posting cadence and engagement-led distribution, this increased reach, strengthened brand identity, and drove sustained customer footfall.

overview: A targeted content strategy that highlighted unique selling propositions to transform a modern Birmingham specialty café into a premier, highly visited community and event hub.
fullDescription: Nexus is a modern specialty cafe and event venue near Digbeth in Birmingham that serves premium coffee, matcha, and fresh pastries while doubling as a vibrant community hub for live music and private bookings. To help them stand out in a saturated market, Centauri executed a consumer journey strategy focused on their unique selling propositions, highlighting their elite drinks, prime location, and dynamic event space. This human-centric storytelling approach successfully bridged the information gap between online discovery and physical arrival, turning casual digital scrollers into loyal physical visitors and solidifying their reputation as a go-to cultural destination.
challenge: As Birmingham's coffee culture became increasingly saturated, Nexus faced the risk of blending in with generic industry noise. They needed a strategic approach to effectively promote their high-end specialty drinks while simultaneously positioning their spacious location as a premier, accessible venue for community events.
solution: Centauri implemented a strategy focused heavily on the brand's unique selling propositions, consistently spotlighting their elite coffee and prime location. The team integrated event-driven content to market the dynamic space, used human-centric storytelling to highlight the staff's expertise, and streamlined the consumer journey to make accessibility and offerings exceptionally clear for new visitors.

overview: Centauri partnered with Phat Spuds to revitalise its digital presence through high-impact food content, increasing engagement, improving performance, and driving consistent customer demand.
fullDescription: Phat Spuds is a comfort-food concept built around indulgent, fully loaded jacket potatoes, delivering bold flavours and generous portions with strong visual appeal. Partnering with the brand, Centauri implemented a content-led growth strategy designed to reposition its digital presence and unlock its full potential within a competitive takeaway market. Through high-fidelity, sensory-driven food cinematography, we transformed their loaded spuds into scroll-stopping content that highlighted texture, steam, and topping overload. This approach allowed Phat Spuds to reintroduce itself with stronger visual impact, positioning the brand as both crave-worthy and highly relevant within its local food scene.
challenge: Despite having a unique product and established presence, Phat Spuds was experiencing underperformance across its digital platforms, with content lacking impact and failing to generate consistent engagement. Visual output did not fully reflect the indulgence and uniqueness of the offering, limiting reach and customer interest. The key challenge was to improve content quality, increase visibility, and reignite demand by better communicating the product’s appeal.
solution: Centauri deployed a refined content strategy centred around high-quality, sensory-led visuals designed to maximise product appeal and capture attention instantly. By focusing on key food moments — from steam release to topping layers — we created highly engaging content optimised for social performance. This was supported by a structured, data-informed posting cadence and active engagement strategy, resulting in increased reach, stronger brand recall, and sustained customer demand.

overview: Centauri partnered with Riz Pure to elevate its digital presence through high-quality product content, increasing brand credibility, engagement, and customer trust within the halal wellness market.
fullDescription: Riz Pure is a halal collagen product designed to support health, beauty, and wellness while aligning with the values of a conscious, ingredient-aware audience. Partnering with the brand, Centauri implemented a content-led strategy aimed at positioning Riz Pure as both a premium and trustworthy product within a growing wellness space. Through clean, high-definition visuals and structured product storytelling, we showcased packaging, usage, and lifestyle integration, transforming a functional supplement into an aspirational, lifestyle-driven product. This approach allowed Riz Pure to stand out within a competitive health market while appealing directly to a niche, value-driven audience.
challenge: Operating within a saturated wellness and supplement market, Riz Pure faced the challenge of building trust and differentiating itself as a halal-certified product. As a category driven heavily by credibility and perception, existing content lacked the clarity and visual quality needed to effectively communicate benefits and build consumer confidence. The key challenge was to elevate brand perception, establish trust, and position the product as both premium and culturally relevant.
solution: Centauri deployed a refined content strategy focused on clean, professional visuals and lifestyle-led storytelling to highlight both product quality and everyday use. By combining product-focused shots with aspirational content, we created a balance between credibility and desirability. Supported by a consistent posting cadence and engagement-led distribution, this increased visibility, strengthened trust, and positioned Riz Pure as a standout brand within the halal wellness space.

overview: A strategic brand evolution and sensory content campaign that transformed a local Birmingham burger hut into a viral social media sensation with massive real-world foot traffic.
fullDescription: Sani’s Chicken is a premier Birmingham burger destination famous for its bold fried chicken and smash burgers topped with signature sauces and spicy glazes. To help them break out of their stagnant digital reach, Centauri refined their visual identity and implemented an evolutionary growth strategy using high-fidelity sensory cinematography to showcase their loaded boxes and custom fries. By pairing this mouthwatering visual storytelling with algorithmic consistency and engagement engineering, we successfully transitioned them from a stable local shop into a market-dominating viral powerhouse.
challenge: Despite having a stable foundation and great food, Sani’s Chicken was experiencing stagnant digital reach and lacked the explosive growth needed to dominate the highly competitive Birmingham food scene. The challenge was to take their existing brand identity and evolve it to improve visual quality, increase interaction, and translate online hype into a sustainable, long-term customer base.
solution: Centauri adapted the existing brand identity with a cleaner, punchier aesthetic and deployed a sensory visual storytelling approach using high-texture cinematography to trigger immediate consumer cravings. This high-end content was paired with a rigorous, data-backed posting schedule and active community management to maximize algorithmic reach and turn passive viewers into active brand advocates.

overview: A completely organic, content-led social media campaign that built an engaged audience from scratch and sold out a major Birmingham cultural event in just three weeks.
fullDescription: Somalinimo UK is the organizer behind one of Birmingham’s biggest cultural events, aiming to celebrate and showcase Somali heritage. Facing a strict three-week deadline with zero initial followers and no established online presence, Centauri took full control to execute a completely organic, content-led growth strategy. By developing social-first creative and leveraging community-driven storytelling tailored to the target demographic, the campaign rapidly built brand awareness and successfully sold out the entire show without relying on any paid advertising.
challenge: The organization needed to build an engaged audience from absolute zero, drive massive awareness, and sell out tickets for a major cultural event in just three weeks, all without utilizing any paid advertising budget.
solution: Centauri took full control of the brand-new account and implemented a highly targeted, entirely organic content strategy. By leveraging cultural relevance and community-driven storytelling, the team maximized organic reach and put the brand in front of the exact right demographic to drive rapid ticket sales.

overview: Centauri partnered with The Royal Palm to elevate its digital presence through premium visual content, transforming its in-store experience into a compelling and in-demand destination online.
fullDescription: The Royal Palm is a premium dining destination defined by its rich, indulgent menu and elevated in-store experience, blending bold flavours with a refined, hospitality-led atmosphere. Partnering with the brand, Centauri implemented a high-end content strategy designed to reflect the quality of the offering while increasing digital visibility and customer demand. Through cinematic, sensory-led visuals, we captured everything from plated dishes to ambience, creating scroll-stopping content that communicated both taste and experience. Combined with a structured rollout and engagement-driven distribution, this positioned The Royal Palm as a standout destination within its local dining scene.
challenge: Despite offering a strong product and premium environment, The Royal Palm faced the challenge of translating its in-person experience into a compelling digital presence. Existing content lacked the visual depth and consistency needed to fully showcase the quality of the food and atmosphere, limiting engagement and reach. The key challenge was to elevate perception, increase interaction, and bridge the gap between online discovery and in-store experience.
solution: Centauri deployed a refined visual strategy centred around high-fidelity cinematography and a cleaner, more premium aesthetic to align with the brand’s positioning. By focusing on lighting, texture, and atmosphere, we created content that highlighted both the food and the overall dining experience. This was supported by a consistent, data-informed posting cadence and audience engagement strategy, driving increased reach, stronger brand perception, and sustained customer interest.

overview: Centauri partnered with The Shawarma Shop to elevate its digital presence through high-impact food content, increasing visibility, engagement, and consistent customer demand within Birmingham’s competitive takeaway scene.
fullDescription: The Shawarma Shop is a fast-paced, flavour-driven takeaway concept specialising in authentic shawarma, grilled meats, and loaded wraps, built to deliver bold taste and strong street-food appeal. Partnering with the brand, Centauri implemented a content-led growth strategy designed to modernise its digital presence and amplify product appeal. Through high-fidelity, sensory-driven food cinematography, we captured the movement, texture, and freshness of their offering — from meat carving to sauce layering — transforming everyday items into scroll-stopping content optimised for digital performance. This positioned The Shawarma Shop as a recognisable and desirable destination within Birmingham’s highly competitive food market.
challenge: Operating in a saturated takeaway market, The Shawarma Shop faced the challenge of standing out amongst numerous competitors offering similar products. Despite having a strong menu, the brand lacked consistent, high-quality content and struggled to maintain visibility across digital platforms. The key challenge was to elevate visual presentation, increase engagement, and convert local audiences into regular, returning customers.
solution: Centauri deployed a refined content strategy centred around high-quality, sensory-led visuals designed to highlight freshness, preparation, and flavour. By focusing on dynamic food moments — such as slicing, wrapping, and sauce application — we created engaging, performance-driven content tailored for social media. Supported by a structured posting cadence and active engagement strategy, this increased reach, strengthened brand recall, and drove sustained local demand.

overview: A data-driven social media and content consistency campaign that elevated a premium UK international grocery chain into a nationally recognized brand with massive digital reach and sustained physical store visits.
fullDescription: Umrah Supermarket is a premier UK retail chain specializing in a vast global range of grocery items including African, Caribbean, and Asian cuisines, alongside a fresh Halal butcher and in-store bakery. To help them stand out in a competitive grocery landscape, Centauri executed a market dominance and consistency framework that utilized high-frequency cinematic content to highlight their clean, vibrant, and inclusive shopping environment. This strategic approach effectively communicated their diverse product range and affordability, transforming their digital presence into a real-time catalog that drove massive engagement and sustained physical store visits across all UK branches.
challenge: Umrah Supermarket needed to maintain its digital momentum in the highly competitive UK grocery landscape while positioning its branches as clean and pristine shopping destinations. The primary challenge was balancing a premium visual aesthetic with a strong message of affordability to effectively communicate its diverse international product range and special offers to both new and existing consumers nationwide.
solution: Centauri implemented a high-frequency consistency model backed by deep consumer market intelligence to scale the brand's reach. By producing regular, cinematic content that showcased their wide array of inclusive Halal products, fresh bakery items, and seasonal offers, the strategy reinforced their premium brand image while functioning as an amplified digital catalog that incentivized immediate real-world store visits.

overview: A contrast-driven social media strategy that transformed a premium Alum Rock café into a viral study-and-sip sanctuary, overcoming local geographical stigma to drive massive physical foot traffic.
fullDescription: Vivace Cafe & Pizzeria is a premium dining destination in the heart of Alum Rock, Birmingham, offering a unique blend of Italian-inspired cuisine, traditional favorites, and specialty drinks in a modern, well-lit environment. To help them overcome the local stigma associated with the area, Centauri executed a visual contrast and community approach that showcased the stunning interior beauty of the café against public perceptions of the location. By combining high-fidelity cinematic content with student-centric marketing and interactive event integration, the strategy successfully positioned the venue as a premier escape and drove consistent, daily physical visits from a broader demographic.
challenge: The primary obstacle was overcoming the local stigma associated with Alum Rock as being crowded or unappealing. Vivace needed to differentiate itself entirely from the perceived local environment and highlight its high-end decor, professional staff, and diverse menu to attract a broader target market looking for a luxury experience.
solution: Centauri utilized a visual contrast branding approach, using cinematic content to highlight the stunning interior and position it as a hidden sanctuary that defied local geography. This polished content was paired with student-centric marketing promoting amenities like free Wi-Fi and discounts, along with interactive community event integration like game nights to drive new discovery and turn first-time visitors into loyal regulars.

overview: Centauri partnered with Wall Street Burger to elevate their digital presence through high-impact food content, turning a strong local offering into a recognised and in-demand destination in Kit’s Green.
fullDescription: Wall Street Burger is a bold, street-inspired burger concept delivering indulgent, flavour-loaded menu items with a strong visual identity designed to stand out in Birmingham’s competitive takeaway scene. Partnering with their Kit’s Green location, Centauri implemented a content-driven growth strategy focused on elevating brand perception and driving consistent local demand. Through high-impact, sensory-led food cinematography, we transformed their burgers, loaded fries, and signature items into scroll-stopping visuals that emphasised texture, melt, and indulgence. Combined with a structured content rollout and engagement-focused distribution, this approach positioned Wall Street Burger as a recognisable and in-demand destination within its local area.
challenge: Operating in a saturated fast-food market, Wall Street Burger faced the challenge of cutting through local competition and building a stronger digital presence to match the quality of its product. Despite having a solid offering, there was limited standout content and inconsistent visibility online, restricting growth potential. The key challenge was to elevate visual quality, increase engagement, and convert passive local audiences into active, repeat customers.
solution: Centauri deployed a refined content strategy centred around high-quality, sensory-driven visuals designed to instantly capture attention and communicate product appeal. By introducing a cleaner, more impactful visual style and focusing on key food moments — from burger stacks to sauce drips — we created content optimised for engagement and shareability. This was supported by a consistent, data-informed posting cadence and active audience engagement, enabling increased reach, stronger brand recall, and sustained local demand.

overview: Centauri partnered with Zamora Housing to elevate their property presentation through high-quality visual content, increasing visibility, credibility, and tenant enquiries in a competitive market.
fullDescription: Zamora Housing is a property-focused brand delivering quality housing solutions with an emphasis on reliability, presentation, and tenant experience. Partnering with the brand, Centauri implemented a content-led strategy designed to elevate their digital presence and position their portfolio as both professional and desirable within a competitive property market. Through clean, high-quality visuals and structured storytelling, we showcased properties, interiors, and key features in a way that built trust and increased perceived value. This approach allowed Zamora Housing to present itself as a credible, modern operator while driving consistent interest across its listings.
challenge: Operating within a highly competitive property sector, Zamora Housing faced the challenge of standing out in a market where listings often appear generic and visually underwhelming. Existing digital presence lacked consistency and failed to fully communicate the quality of the properties, limiting engagement and enquiry rates. The key challenge was to elevate presentation, build trust through stronger visual identity, and convert online views into serious tenant interest.
solution: Centauri deployed a refined content strategy focused on clean, professional visuals and structured property storytelling to highlight space, layout, and key selling points. By standardising visual output and introducing a consistent posting approach, we ensured every property was presented at a higher perceived value. This was supported by an engagement-led distribution strategy, increasing visibility, improving brand credibility, and driving higher-quality enquiries.
